  <!-- Front pentagon (z = front) -->
  <!-- 5 vertices of front pentagon, centred approx at (130, 148) -->
  <!-- A=130,82  B=181,110  C=168,162  D=92,162  E=79,110 -->

  <!-- Back pentagon offset by (+72, -30) isometric shift -->
  <!-- A'=202,52  B'=253,80  C'=240,132  D'=164,132  E'=151,80 -->

  <!-- Hidden back edges -->
  <line class=""edge-hidden"" x1=""202"" y1=""52"" x2=""253"" y2=""80""/>

  <line class=""edge-hidden"" x1=""202"" y1=""52"" x2=""130"" y2=""82""/>
